corrections.note: Printed body text has double lambda: ἐλληλύθει.
Acute on σύ is visible in the scan.

corrections.location: first paragraph, verse number after αὐτοῦ.
corrections.note: A right-margin line number 14 is present in the scan but omitted from the transcription; since marginal line indicators are part of the page and should be verified independently, record as marginal/line-number issue.
The scan shows a raised middle dot after αὐτήν, not a full stop.

notes: Running head matches. Apparatus line '13 ἐλληλυθει 87ed' matches the scan. The numerals 14, 19, 22, 23 in the body are verse numbers; the repeated 14/19/22/23 at the right margin are page line indicators.
